title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: nmstate bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for nmstate is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: Nmstate is a library with an accompanying command line tool that manages host networking settings in a declarative manner and aimed to satisfy enterprise needs to manage host networking through a northbound declarative API and multi provider support on the southbound.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Support MAC referring for VLAN in `nmstatectl gc` [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-110368)  [FR] Request to Add Support for Sending Left Certificate(leftsendcert) in X.509-Based VPN Authentication [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-110633)  [RFE] Add alt-names to network interfaces [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-110777)  Support per-interface IPv4 forwarding via sysctl in nmstate [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-110786)  nmstate fails in systems with NetworkManager-wait-online timeout [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-116449)

full_text:
An update for nmstate is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Nmstate is a library with an accompanying command line tool that manages host networking settings in a declarative manner and aimed to satisfy enterprise needs to manage host networking through a northbound declarative API and multi provider support on the southbound.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Support MAC referring for VLAN in `nmstatectl gc` [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-110368)  [FR] Request to Add Support for Sending Left Certificate(leftsendcert) in X.509-Based VPN Authentication [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-110633)  [RFE] Add alt-names to network interfaces [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-110777)  Support per-interface IPv4 forwarding via sysctl in nmstate [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-110786)  nmstate fails in systems with NetworkManager-wait-online timeout [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-116449)
